    <div id="scroll">


      <!-- HOME -->
      <div class="page on" id="pg-home">

        <!-- HERO BANNER: image background + floating topbar in sky zone -->
        <div style="position:relative;margin-bottom:0;">
          <!-- Full image, zero overlay -->
          <img
            src="data:image/jpeg;base64,"
            style="width:100%;display:block;" alt="">
          <!-- Floating controls: location + search in sky (top ~22%) -->
          <div style="position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;padding:10px 14px;z-index:5;">
            <!-- Row 1: location + notification -->
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:7px;">
              <div onclick="openLocationPicker()"
                style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;cursor:pointer;background:rgba(255,255,255,.2);backdrop-filter:blur(8px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(8px);padding:5px 12px;border-radius:20px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.5);">
                <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="2.5">
                  <path d="M21 10c0 7-9 13-9 13s-9-6-9-13a9 9 0 0 1 18 0z" />
                  <circle cx="12" cy="10" r="3" />
                </svg>
                <span id="current-city"
                  style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;text-shadow:0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.35);">胡志明市</span>
                <svg width="10" height="10" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="2.5">
                  <polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9" />
                </svg>
              </div>
              <div onclick="toast('暂无新通知')"
                style="cursor:pointer;width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(255,255,255,.2);backdrop-filter:blur(8px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(8px);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.5);">
                <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="2">
                  <path d="M18 8A6 6 0 0 0 6 8c0 7-3 9-3 9h18s-3-2-3-9" />
                  <path d="M13.73 21a2 2 0 0 1-3.46 0" />
                </svg>
              </div>
            </div>
            <!-- Row 2: search bar -->
            <div style="display:flex;gap:7px;align-items:center;">
              <div onclick="openSearch()"
                style="flex:1;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.88);backdrop-filter:blur(12px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(12px);border-radius:22px;padding:8px 13px;cursor:pointer;box-shadow:0 2px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.1);">
                <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#9AA3B5" stroke-width="2">
                  <circle cx="11" cy="11" r="8" />
                  <path d="m21 21-4.35-4.35" />
                </svg>
                <span style="font-size:12px;color:#9AA3B5;">搜索服务、签证、接机、翻译...</span>
              </div>
              <button onclick="openSearch()"
                style="padding:8px 14px;border-radius:22px;background:var(--bl);color:#fff;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;border:none;cursor:pointer;white-space:nowrap;box-shadow:0 2px 10px rgba(13,71,161,.4);">搜索</button>
            </div>
          </div>
